info.name: Dashboard Stok Bibit - Push API
info.description: API Integration for sending (pushing) Nursery Stock data updates to the Central Dashboard from 3rd-party systems.

header.description: The unique API Key provided for your BPDAS / Nursery.

request.description:
Updates or Inserts Seedling Stock for a specific Nursery.

**Payload Info:**
- `nursery_id` (Integer) - (Wajib) Mengunci logik ke titik persemaian. Harus berada di bawah wewenang API Key (BPDAS) Anda.
- `seedling_type_id` (Integer) - (Wajib) Merujuk pada ID Master Jenis Bibit di dashboard pusat.
- `quantity` (Integer) - (Wajib) Sisa sediaan stok.
- `notes` (String) - (Opsional) Keterangan tambahan.
- `last_sync_timestamp` (String) - (Opsional) Timestap spesifik data diperbarui. (Lebih dianjurkan daripada membiarkan server mengeset timestamp waktu masuk/delay).
